candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line from petroleum activities; matches definition of total revenue/sales.
Includes petroleum revenues plus other operating income; more of an aggregate income line than pure sales.

candidates.row_label: Interest income on bank accounts and receivables
candidates.why: Financial income, not operating revenue; does not match top-line sales concept.
Financial income, not operating revenue; does not match top-line sales concept.
Net non-operating result, not sales; includes various financial components.
Tax-related item, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Liability representing revenue collected but not yet earned; not the revenue flow itself.

variables.notes: Petroleum revenues is the main operating revenue line. Total income is included as a secondary option in case the revenue presentation changes to an aggregate income line in some years.

candidates.why: Exploration costs are related to finding resources, not ongoing production/sales costs; may be treated separately from cost of goods sold.
General operating overhead rather than direct production costs; better suited for SG&A components.
R&D is not a direct production or service cost; should not be classified as COGS.
Overhead (SG&A), not direct production costs.
Financial result, not operating production cost.
Unwinding of discount on ARO; more of a finance/estimate adjustment than direct production cost.
Financing-related amortization, not cost of goods sold.
Financial expenses, not COGS.
Financial result, not direct production costs.
Balance sheet asset, not an expense line; cannot serve as COGS.

variables.notes: The true COGS-equivalent line is 'Production costs', which represents direct petroleum production costs. It is present in the Income Statement but missing from the provided candidate list, so it was selected from the full A-column per instructions. Exploration expenses and other operating/administrative expenses are not as conceptually accurate for COGS in this context. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Production costs

candidates.why: Income, not expense; should not be treated as SG&A expense.
Income, not expense; should not be treated as SG&A expense.
Operating overhead expenses that fit SG&A-type costs (excluding COGS and D&A).
Classic SG&A-type overhead (administrative) expenses.

variables.notes: Selected SG&A as component expenses: 'Other operating expenses' and 'Administrative expenses'. Income lines were excluded as they are not SG&A expenses.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled research & development expense; matches XRD definition directly.

variables.notes: R&D is clearly and explicitly reported as a separate expense line.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense on debt; best match for interest expense.
Generic interest expense line; also a strong match.
Interest component of lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Interest capitalized to assets; not an expense in P&L but related to interest; included only if no pure expense lines are available.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of interest rate hedges (ineffectiveness)
candidates.why: Hedge ineffectiveness; not pure interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease-related interest expense; relevant as a component of total interest.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest-bearing loans and borrowings excluding financial lease
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not an expense line.
Balance sheet interest payable, not the expense recognition itself.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list focuses on explicit interest expense lines. Capitalized interest and hedge ineffectiveness are excluded from the priority list to avoid mixing non-expensed or derivative components into XINT.

candidates.why: Component of equity but not total equity attributable to owners; not suitable alone as BE.
Total equity attributable to shareholders; best proxy for book equity excluding any non-controlling interest (none is separately reported).
Total equity including shareholders' equity; very close to shareholders' equity here, but slightly less specific.
Technical balancing row, not a substantive equity total.
Balancing item, not an actual equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item to close the balance sheet; not equity itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities plus equity; not pure equity.

variables.notes: No separate non-controlling interests line is present; 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' is the appropriate book equity attributable to owners. MIB is set to 0 via an empty selection.
No line item for minority interests or non-controlling interests appears in the balance sheet; thus MIB is treated as 0.
